case_title: SYSTEM PAVERS - LYNN LEMKE VS. DAVID MARCANTONIO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $99) SERVED DEC-19-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARCANTONIO, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SYSTEM PAVERS - LYNN LEMKI IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BAILEY ANDES, PROJECT MANAGER. PLAINTIFF SYSTEM PAVERS - LYNN LEMKI IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FLETCHER LILL, CONSTURCTION MANAGER. DEFENDANT DAVID MARCANTONIO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LYNN LEMKY'S CASE IN SYSTEM PAVERS - LYNN LEMKY V DAVID MARCANTONIO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYSTEM PAVERS - LYNN LEMKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCANTONIO, DAVID $4,724.50 PRINCIPAL, $149.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,873.50, PLAINTIFF LYNN LEMKE'S CASE IN SYSTEM PAVERS-LYNN LEMKE VS DAVID MARCANTONIO IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
